title: pptx_native SmartArt Layout Catalog
description: Structured description of every PowerPoint built-in SmartArt layout supported by the pptx_native engine. See spec §5. All layouts are extracted from the MIT-licensed dotnet/Open-XML-SDK test fixtures by tools/extract_smartart_layouts.py.

id.description: Stable identifier (e.g. 'process1'). Matches the layout's directory name under tests/fixtures/smartart_layouts/.

layout_uri.description: Full OOXML layout URI (from the SDK fixture's data1.xml doc point). Written verbatim to the doc point at runtime.

qs_type_id.description: Quick style URI. Written verbatim to the doc point.

cs_type_id.description: Color scheme URI. Written verbatim to the doc point.

layout_dir.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the directory containing layout.xml, quickStyle.xml, colors.xml, and meta.json. Produced by tools/extract_smartart_layouts.py.

display_name.description: Human-friendly name shown in speaker-facing messaging.

engine.description: Engine this entry belongs to. Always pptx_native in v1.

data_shape.description: Determines which generic builder handles the layout. flat_list covers process/cycle/list/matrix/pyramid/relationship; hierarchical covers org chart and hierarchy layouts; picture is deferred to a later phase.

node_type_capabilities.description: Special node types this layout supports beyond the default regular node. Only 'asst' is valid in v1 (for org chart assistant nodes).

min_nodes.description: Minimum node count. Below this, extractor falls back to custom_svg.

max_nodes.description: Maximum node count. Above this, extractor truncates or falls back.

max_label_chars_rationale.description: Why the cap is what it is. For first-pass SDK-derived layouts, says 'first-pass default per category norms; refine after manual gate'.

when_to_use.description: Narrative scenarios where this layout is the right choice.

selector_rationale_template.description: Template the selector uses when proposing this layout. Supports {n}/{first}/{last} placeholders for flat lists and {n}/{depth} for hierarchies.

example_input.description: Small input object for tests and the docs generator.

smartart_type_mappings.description: graphic_type values this layout can back.

replaces_custom_svg_when.description: Human-readable condition under which selector should bias toward pptx_native vs custom_svg.

extensions.description: Free-form layout-specific extras. Not used in v1.
